title: Approve PROP-041 (all 8 Q-OP answers per tinker recommendations) and authorize tinker to author PROP-041-amendment-001-implementation — the concrete patch set needed to land Phase 2 sloppytoppy-rewrite. Implementation amendment goes back through operator review before any edits land in production prompts.
scope_authority: Design amendment only (PROP-041-amendment-001). Operator reviews amendment, then operator + cowork-claude apply prompt + script + scheduler edits. Tinker authors the amendment, does NOT self-apply.
context: PROP-041 filed 2026-05-16 by tinker as design-pending-operator-review. Operator review completed 2026-05-16 ~09:10Z.
Operator accepts all 8 Q-OP recommendations as written. No amendments to the design.

Operator confirmed implementation should proceed. The next handoff is tinker authoring the implementation amendment (concrete patches for prompts, schemas, scripts, scheduler) so operator + cowork-claude can apply with a clean review trail.

Q-OP-1_curmudgeon_path.rationale: Audit-script pre-check (mechanical numeric/citation preservation) + Opus curmudgeon review via priority-queue class='rewrite-verify' (judgment work on argument structure). Belt-and-suspenders matches the operator's stated risk preference.

Q-OP-2_predict_delta.rationale: Heuristic gate decision + canonical rescore at next sloppytoppy-score run + recalibration-flag if drift persists. Cheapest gate; canonical rescore is free; recalibration catches systematic miscalibration.

Q-OP-3_cadence.rationale: Cooldown=14d means daily provides no proportional benefit. Every-3 creates onboarding lag. 05:00 UTC offsets from sloppytoppy-score's 03:30 cleanly.

Q-OP-4_initial_scope.answer: All surface types at launch (WIN fields + section_details_block)
Q-OP-4_initial_scope.rationale: Capability-first per D1. Operator acknowledges section_details_block risk (composite=0 part4 walls-of-text are the hardest territory) but the rollback criteria — curmudgeon reject rate >40% for 7 runs triggers abort — bounds the exposure. If section_details_block produces disproportionate rejections in first 2 weeks, defer that scope via operator-tunable prompt edit.

Q-OP-5_max_rewrite_attempts.rationale: Reasonable cap. Counter lives in sidecar monitor/sloppytoppy/rewrite-attempts.json (rewriter increments on draft, decider clears on integration success). Sidecar preserves scores.json single-writer discipline.

Q-OP-6_no_category_fit.answer: Require at least one A/B/C/D/E category tag; otherwise write PUNT record with punt_reason='no-category-fit'
Q-OP-6_no_category_fit.rationale: Forces explicit categorization. PUNT records surface taxonomy gaps to operator review.

Q-OP-7_recalibration_trigger.answer: Drift >1.0 on >=3 of last 5 integrated rewrites
Q-OP-7_recalibration_trigger.rationale: Documented default; tunable after 30 days of telemetry.

Q-OP-8_audit_script_location.rationale: Runtime audit, not a build step. Distinct directory from build-scripts/. Add to CLAUDE.md File Ownership as git-owned.

operator_intent: Tinker authors PROP-041-amendment-001-implementation as a concrete patch set listing every file to be created or modified, the diff (or full-file content) for each, and any new operational conventions (CLAUDE.md File Ownership entries, build.js OWNERSHIP entries, workspace-sync.md iteration entries, scheduler registration parameters). The amendment is reviewed by operator before any of those edits land. Operator + cowork-claude then apply the amendment in a single coordinated session, similar to how PROP-014 amendment-001 + Q6 was applied.

new_files_to_create: monitor/scripts/audit-rewrite.js (the pre-check audit script for Q-OP-1 Option C)
existing_files_to_modify: monitor/prompts/decider-intake.md (new Step Nm — Rewrite Proposal Integration)

monitor/prompts/curmudgeon-change-and-holistic.md OR a new section in curmudgeon-verify.md (rewrite-verify class handling — operator preference: keep verify agents narrow, so probably curmudgeon-change-and-holistic handles class='rewrite-verify' under Priority N)
monitor/prompts/decider.md (priority bracket adjustment if rewrite-verify class needs queue priority changes)
monitor/curmudgeon/priority-queue.json (add class='rewrite-verify' to allowed-classes schema documentation; the file's writers field stays the same since decider remains the queue's primary writer)

build.js OWNERSHIP object (add monitor/sloppytoppy/rewrites/ as append_only_glob, monitor/sloppytoppy/rewrite-attempts.json as git-owned, monitor/scripts/audit-rewrite.js as git-owned, monitor/prompts/reference/sloppytoppy-rewrite-rubric.md as git-owned, monitor/prompts/sloppytoppy-rewrite.md as git-owned)
monitor/prompts/workspace-sync.md (NEVER_PUSH additions for the same set; iteration entry for rewrites/ to allow workspace→git if anyone writes there)
CLAUDE.md (Phase 2 row in pipeline table; File Ownership additions; computed-counts entry if relevant)
monitor/prompts/reference/DATA-SCHEMAS.md (RW-NNN.json schema; rewrite-attempts.json schema; priority-queue class='rewrite-verify' field semantics)
test.js (smoke tests for audit-rewrite.js + RW schema validation if applicable)
implementation_surface_to_cover_in_amend.scheduler_registration: Create dome-sloppytoppy-rewrite (Opus, cron '0 5 */2 * *' = every 2 days at 05:00 UTC). Operator does this via cowork-claude scheduled-tasks tool after amendment is applied.

tasks_for_tinker.description: Author PROP-041-amendment-001-implementation as a comprehensive patch set. For each file in implementation_surface_to_cover_in_amendment, provide either (a) full file content for new files or (b) old_string + new_string diffs for existing files. Use the patch shape that PROP-014-amendment-001 used (which operator + cowork-claude could apply in a single session). Group patches by phase: Phase 2a (data plumbing: schemas, ownership, directories), Phase 2b (script + prompt: audit-rewrite.js + sloppytoppy-rewrite.md + rewrite-rubric.md), Phase 2c (intake integration: decider-intake.md + curmudgeon-change-and-holistic.md), Phase 2d (scheduler registration + smoke test).

Before completing, walk the amendment one more time: (a) confirm no file in NEVER_PUSH is being written by a non-canonical writer, (b) confirm no append-only directory is being written to with a stable filename, (c) confirm priority-queue.json writers field is preserved (decider remains sole writer; rewriter enqueues via decider intake, not directly), (d) confirm decider-intake.md additions don't conflict with PROP-037 severity-filter additions or PROP-040 conditional-load extractions, (e) confirm audit-rewrite.js exit codes integrate cleanly with curmudgeon Priority N (failure modes documented).
tasks_for_tinker.deliverable: regression_check section in the amendment with each item explicitly checked off.

in_scope_for_tinker: Author one implementation amendment to PROP-041
Walk the implementation surface for regressions
Apply the 8 Q-OP answers verbatim — operator has approved them, no additional design questions
out_of_scope_for_tinker: Do NOT modify any prompt or script directly. Amendment-only.
Do NOT register the scheduled task. Operator + cowork-claude does that step after the amendment is applied.

Do NOT raise new design questions in this amendment. If something unexpected arises during the regression check, file a separate amendment (-002) or a clarifying directive. The 8 Q-OP answers are decided.
operator_preferences_for_amendment: Single comprehensive amendment, not multiple round trips
Phased patch groupings (2a/2b/2c/2d) so operator + cowork-claude can apply in stages with verification between phases
Every new file fully spelled out; every edit to existing file given as exact old_string/new_string pair (the format that PROP-014-amendment-001 used)
